Game.Name: Mickey no Tokyo Disneyland Daibouken (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Mickey no Tokyo Disneyland Daibouken ("Mickey's Great Tokyo Disneyland Adventure") is a platformer developed by GRC and published by toy company Tomy exclusively in Japan for the Super Famicom. It features and is built around the Tokyo Disneyland theme park.Mickey makes his way to Tokyo Disneyland but discovers that his friends have been captured by the park's new owner: his old nemesis Pete. Mickey must make his way through a number of the park's themed attractions armed with nothing but combination helium/water balloons. The balloons can be used as both as either a means of traversal or as a weapon depending on which is used to fill them up.Cheat: Level Codes - EasyKey: T = Triangle, C = Circle, S = Star, D = Diamond, SQ = Square Cheat: Level Codes - EasyKey: T = Triangle, C = Circle, S = Star, D = Diamond, SQ = SquareCheat: Level Codes - EasyKey: T = Triangle, C = Circle, S = Star, D = Diamond, SQ = Square
Game.Notes: Mickey has taken a trip to Tokyo Disneyland. But when he arrives, he finds out from Minnie that his friends have been kidnapped and the park has been hijacked by none other than Pete. Armed with nothing but a combo water/helium backpack and some balloons, Mickey must trek through the different sections of the park to rescue his friends, held captive in some of the park's most iconic attractions, and stop Pete.
